name: Pistachio Delight
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the pudding and Cool Whip together.
2. Add the pineapple with liquid and mix.
3. Add the walnuts and marshmallows.
4. Refrigerate for 8 hours before serving.
This is a very colorful and delicious salad or dessert. You will get a lot of compliments.
